Harvard Recreation Facility Hours

*Spring Recess Hours begin Saturday 3/14/2026. Please see bottom of page for more details.   

 

  • MAC Spring 2026 Hours 

    Monday 6:00am - 10:00pm

    Tuesday 6:00am - 10:00pm

    Wednesday 6:00am - 10:00pm

    Thursday 6:00am - 10:00pm

    Friday 6:00am - 7:00pm

    Saturday 9:00am - 5:00pm

    Sunday 9:00am - 9:00pm

    *Building hours are subject to change for holidays, breaks, inclement weather and maintenance concerns. 

  • Hemenway Spring 2026 Hours 

    Monday 6:00am - 11:00pm

    Tuesday 6:00am - 11:00pm

    Wednesday 6:00am - 11:00pm

    Thursday 6:00am - 11:00pm

    Friday 6:00am - 9:00pm

    Saturday 9:00am - 8:00pm

    Sunday 9:00am - 11:00pm

    *Building hours are subject to change for holidays, breaks, inclement weather and maintenance concerns. 

  • Murr Tennis Courts will be CLOSED March 14th - March 22nd. 

  • Tennis and Squash Courts availability varies daily throughout the operational hours listed above.  Please check reservations for available times Further details and reservation times can be found here: Tennis & Squash

    Murr Tennis Courts will be CLOSED March 14th - March 22nd. 

  •  

    *ALL HOURS SUBJECT TO CHANGE 

  • Tennis and Squash Courts are available by reservation only. Further details and reservation times can be found here: Tennis & Squash  

     

    Beren will close for the season on 10/22

  • You must make a reservation for Weld

    Monday-Friday: 10:00am -2:30pm

  • QRAC Spring 2026 Hours 

    Monday 8:00am - 11:00pm

    Tuesday 8:00am - 11:00pm

    Wednesday 8:00am - 11:00pm

    Thursday 8:00am - 11:00pm

    Friday 8:00am - 7:00pm

    Saturday 9:00am - 6:00pm

    Sunday 9:00am - 9:00pm

    *Building hours are subject to change for holidays, breaks, inclement weather and maintenance concerns. 

  • QRAC Climbing Wall 

    Monday  4:00pm - 10:00pm 

    Tuesday 4:00pm - 7:00pm

    Wednesday 4:00pm - 10:00pm

    Thursday 4:00pm - 7:00pm

    Friday 3:00pm - 5:00pm

    Saturday 10:00am - 4:00pm

    Sunday 10:00am - 4:00pm

    *Wall hours are subject to change for holidays, breaks, inclement weather and maintenance concerns. 

    *Climbing Wall Membership is required to use the Wall.

  • *The QRAC Tennis Courts are closed for the season. The courts will reopen Monday, March 30th. 

     

  • Gordon Indoor Track Winter Hours Update:  All dates listed below are Sundays from 10am-2pm:

    December 14, 21 and 28 - January 4 and 11 - February 1, and 15-  March 1 and 8

    For questions or assistance, visit the Murr Fitness Center front desk

    Access Requirements:

    • A valid Harvard University ID (HUID) is required for entry.
    • Running shoes are required

  • Open Skate Times: Bright Landry  11am-1pm Monday's and Wednesdays (subject to change depending on hockey programs schedule).

    *No hockey sticks/pucks.

    Please enter the lower double doors on the Quad side of the Arena- These doors are programmed to be open at 10:30 am. Last day of open skate will be Wednesday April 1st 2026.

Spring Recess Facility Hours

March 14 – March 22, 2026
